candidates.name: Email Response Velocity Forecaster
candidates.pitch: Analyzes historical email thread reply patterns by recipient domain and time-of-day. Suggests optimal follow-up windows. Gap: no per-recipient email cadence intelligence in-browser.
candidates.pain: Outbound reps follow up too early or too late because they lack thread velocity data.

candidates.name: Schema Drift Alert Overlay
candidates.pitch: Intercepts JSON responses and validates against a declared OpenAPI/JSON Schema. Alerts on drift with diff view. Gap: no in-browser schema validation guard.
candidates.pain: Backend teams discover breaking schema changes in production instead of staging.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: CRM Public Record Conflict Checker
candidates.pitch: Scrapes LinkedIn, Crunchbase, and news for signal vs CRM field mismatches. One engineer can build the scraper layer in 4 weeks. Gap: no tool cross-validates sales data against public sources in real-t
candidates.pain: Sales reps waste hours chasing leads whose public data contradicts their CRM records.

candidates.name: Meeting Summary Action Item Carver
candidates.pitch: Extracts action items from pasted transcripts or Gong embeds using lightweight NER. Exports to CRM fields. Gap: no frictionless meeting-to-task handoff tool.
candidates.pain: Sales and ops teams lose action items buried in meeting transcripts and notes.

candidates.name: API Scaling Trajectory Forecaster
candidates.pitch: Tracks request volume trends per endpoint over rolling windows. Projects capacity needs with simple linear regression. Gap: no in-browser API traffic forecasting panel.
candidates.pain: DevOps teams react to API traffic spikes instead of anticipating scaling needs.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: GitHub Trending Topic Velocity Tracker
candidates.pitch: Tracks HN front-page repo mentions and GitHub star velocity patterns. Builds trending signal before saturation. Gap: no real-time trend velocity overlay exists.
candidates.pain: Developers miss emerging library trends until after the community peak.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Design System Token Consistency Auditor
candidates.pitch: Parses CSS custom properties against a declared token manifest. Flags deviations inline. Can ship as a devtools overlay in 3 weeks. Gap: no live CSS audit for token drift exists.
candidates.pain: Frontend teams ship UIs where design tokens drift silently across components.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: System Dependency Graph Mapper
candidates.pitch: Traces import/require statements and API calls to auto-generate a local dependency graph. Visualizes in a collapsible sidebar. Gap: no browser-devtools integration for live architecture discovery.
candidates.pain: Engineers reverse-engineer system architecture by hand when docs fall out of sync.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link

candidates.name: Job Posting Trend Heatmap
candidates.pitch: Scrapes Indeed/LinkedIn for tech keyword density over time per company. Lightweight extension with cloud aggregation backend. Gap: no browser-native tool surfaces job posting trend intelligence.
candidates.pain: Recruiters and analysts manually track competitor job postings to infer product roadmap signals.
